## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:

## Validation

- [ ] Tests/lint/type checks run (or not applicable with reason)

## Rule Update Checklist (if rules/config changed)

- [ ] Updated the correct layer (`rules/global`, `rules/domain`, or `project`)
- [ ] Added or updated override annotations when project rules override base rules
- [ ] Marked superseded rules explicitly
- [ ] Synced source-of-truth docs if behavior/process changed
- [ ] Ran `bash scripts/lint-layered-rules.sh`
